module.name: quote
module.description: Beautifully displays quotes from papers or books.
module.aiSpec:
A styled PULL-QUOTE with a large decorative quotation mark — good for citing papers, books or notable people. Block module: the body (between the directive and @end) is the quoted text (Markdown allowed). Do NOT use this for code or for a plain blockquote — this is a decorated, attributed callout. Parameters: `author` (text, default "") — attribution line shown beneath the quote. `source` (text, default "") — a second, smaller attribution line (book, paper, year). `align` (select left|center|right, default left) — text alignment of the quote body. `accent` (color, default accent) — the left rule color. `bg` (color, default #f4f6f7) — panel background. `textcolor` (color, default #34495e) — quote text color.
<!-- @quote author: Alan Kay, source: 1971, accent: #7c3aed --> The best way to predict the future is to invent it. <!-- @end -->

param.name: author
param.label: Author
param.desc: Attribution line shown beneath the quote.

param.name: source
param.label: Source
param.desc: Second smaller attribution line (book, paper, year).

snippet.label: Rich Quote
snippet.text: <!-- @quote author: Alan Kay --> The best way to predict the future is to invent it. <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A quote block with a large quotation mark in the background.
